visual_findings: The long-thin lane arrangement is active and improved raw dimension text placement versus the previous dense-left cluster.
The generated drawing still does not match the same-name reference drawing's concise dimension intent.
AutoDimension/model dimension import still creates a heavy dimension network between the front and top long views.
Slanted radius/thread/hole callouts intrude into the main long-thin view area and reduce readability.
Notes and titlebar are present, but the drawing remains visually unacceptable for manufacturing review.
cases.required_next_action: Reduce or filter generic AutoDimension/model dimensions for long_thin parts, then create reference-specific dimension intent groups before rerunning application UI screenshot review.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing.
